steps.title: Identify the decay factor
steps.content: Each week, the collection decreases by $1/2$ of the previous amount. That means the amount left is multiplied by $1/2$ each week.

steps.title: Build the model
steps.content:
The initial number of books is $3{,}600$, and the weekly factor is $1/2$. After $w$ weeks, the model is
$$c=3{,}600(1/2)^w$$
The answer is D.
